Short Description:
We are a Peruvian ethical fashion company dedicated to showcasing the exceptional qualities of alpaca fiber, advocating for environmental care, and empowering knitting communities. We preserve traditional knitting techniques such as needles, crochet, pedal loom, and macramé, creating unique textures and sustainable pieces. We manage two business units:

Clio Brand: We design, knit, and export hand-knitted garments and accessories, blending the latest fashion trends into timeless pieces. Our products are made by urban and rural knitting communities in Peru using natural yarns such as baby alpaca, organic Pima and Tangüis cotton, and high-quality blends.

Clio Studio: We offer comprehensive services including yarn consulting, prototypes, production, quality control, labeling, packaging, and shipping paperwork. Our consulting and sourcing services aim to share our expertise with designers, companies, and brands worldwide, promoting the beauty of baby alpaca and cotton yarns and the talent of our knitters.

Short Description:
Grupo Arié is a family-owned company based in Portugal, established in 1954. It serves as the exclusive distributor for prestigious international brands in the cosmetics, fragrances, and fashion sectors. With over 60 years of experience, Grupo Arié has built a strong presence in the Portuguese market and has expanded its operations internationally, including activities in Angola within the pharmacy and parapharmacy sectors.

The company employs around 300 people and is headquartered in Oeiras, Lisbon. Grupo Arié is committed to values such as accuracy, credibility, and innovation, which guide its relationships with customers and brands. Recently, the company partnered with Europi Property Group to acquire the Lx Factory complex in Lisbon, enhancing its footprint in the retail and cultural landscape.

Short Description:
Caffarena is a Chilean company with a rich history dating back to 1888, when Blas Caffarena Chiozza arrived in Iquique. The company expanded to Santiago in 1920 and established its main operations in Maipú in 1969. By its 90th anniversary, Caffarena was being led by the fourth generation of the family.

Caffarena specializes in intimate apparel and clothing, with key products including panties, chemisettes, leggings, t-shirts, and swimwear. The company has a strong market presence in Chile, where its panties dominated 65% of the market by the late 20th century. Caffarena has also expanded internationally, with products featured in Victoria's Secret catalog in the United States and distribution in countries like Peru, Argentina, Uruguay, and Mexico. The first direct international store opened in Lima, Peru in 2019, and the company celebrated its 100th anniversary in 2020.

Short Description:
SAKE is a living laboratory where ancestral techniques, biomaterials, and ecosystems converge to redefine design and fashion. Founded after more than a decade of immersive research and collaboration across the Andes and Amazon, SAKE bridges ancestral intelligence with contemporary innovation to create fashion that is alive, reciprocal, and regenerative.

Our mission is clear: preserve and revitalize ancestral knowledge; develop biomaterials that extend the lifespan of ecosystems; strengthen community economies through fair, participatory, and regenerative models; and offer alternatives to extractive fashion by creating materials that embody life, territory, and memory.

Governance at SAKE is rooted in accountability, traceability, and reciprocity. For three consecutive years, we have been Fair Trade Certified, ensuring equitable pay, safe working conditions, and compliance with international labor standards. Production timelines, pricing, and innovation are co-defined with artisans and associations, guaranteeing both transparency and financial sovereignty. Growth follows ecological rhythms and cultural protocols, never exceeding what the land and people can sustain.

Each of our materials is developed in dialogue with territory and community: hand-spun alpaca and natural dyes with Pinchimuro in Cusco; native cotton and palm fibers with Shunku Warmi Kuna in San Martín; wild rubber with Eco Bosques Chazuta; paiche fish leather in Ucayali; and biodegradable vegetable-tanned hides with our Lima lab.

Our sustainability in practice engages more than 60 artisans, Indigenous leaders, and forest guardians. Programs such as the Caravana Andina support food security and agricultural sovereignty in the Andes, while Amazkin protects over 240 hectares of Amazon forest. Circular investments extend to greenhouses, clean water systems, health, and education.

We are a bridge between ancestral and contemporary worlds, proving that fashion can regenerate rather than extract.

Short Description:
Creada en 2013 e influenciados por el movimiento Skateboarding de principios del 2000, inspirados por la música underground en sus diferentes expresiones; Body Moving (Baile), DJ & mucho sabor. Nacidos con el ADN Latino, pero con una fuerte influencia en la cultura Street de Los Ángeles, con unos guiños a la moda Asiática & adaptaciones al más puro estilo minimalista, DYNAMO es la Rebel Crew que busca ser disruptiva y convertirse en referente para la moda streetwear actual, democratizándola y marcando la diferencia por medio de siluetas, tendencias & diseños con gráficas desde los básicos más puros y elementales hasta el color y sabor propio de nuestra ubicación geográfica, pasando por un futurismo tecnológico, & valiéndonos de diferentes técnicas de estampación y procesos en telas e índigos que nos permitan expresar toda nuestra esencia.

DYNAMO buscamos romper los estándares establecidos, apelamos a la irreverencia y le damos voz a los que representamos. Decimos con nuestras creaciones Io que muchos no se atreven a decir.

DYNAMO BRAND inicia en el año 2013 con el canal de ventas mayorista, cuyo objetivo en su momento fue suplir la demanda creciente de moda streetwear.

Se realiza la apertura de su primer tienda física en el año 2016 en la ciudad de Medellín, posteriormente, apertura tiendas en Cali y Barranquilla. Actualmente, contamos con 5 puntos de venta; Tres tiendas en Cali, una en Barranquilla y una en Medellín y se proyecta a abrir 4 tiendas más durante el segundo semestre del año 2022.

Durante el confinaminamiento del año 2020 y buscando opciones comerciales para generar la continuidad del negocio y no perder la interacción con nuestros clientes, se decide  fortalecer  el  canal  digital de E-Commerce; www.dynamobran.co dando paso a una nueva era dentro de la marca, abriéndole las puertas a mercados internacionales y proporcionando una ventaja competitiva.

Short Description:
Empresas Pinto S.A. is a prominent Ecuadorian textile company founded in 1913, specializing in the production of knit fabrics and cotton clothing for the entire family. With operations in Ecuador, Colombia, and Peru, the company emphasizes Ecuadorian craftsmanship and environmental responsibility. Its main production plant in Otavalo produces up to 60,000 tons of knit fabric annually and 100,000 garments each month. The company has invested in sustainable infrastructure, including solar panels and wastewater treatment, to support its commitment to the environment.

Pinto offers a wide range of premium cotton clothing designed for comfort and style, including options for women, men, girls, boys, and babies. The products are available for purchase online with nationwide shipping in Ecuador, as well as store pickup and warranty options. The company also provides various customer services, such as order tracking and free exchanges, ensuring a convenient shopping experience.

Short Description:
Con una visión novedosa y cinco años en los kioskos, REGIA sigue liderando el segmento independiente de las revistas de moda. Desde que nacimos, irrumpimos en el mercado con un tono irreverente y cómplice de su lector y, bajo esa insignia, renovamos nuestras ideas con cada número marcando una tendencia única entre las public caciones de su tipo. Así, la gente del palo encontró un refugio, adoptándonos como su revista de culto: un abanico de ref esencias avantgarde para el convite de cultura y el fashion, haciendo de la revista un espacio de culto dónde fotógrafos, diseñadores, productores visuales y audiovisuales reconocidos pueden ver plasmadas sus ideas sin censura. El rumor se corrió y el universo REGIA estalló: Modelitos emergentes y figuritas difíciles del fashion, diseñadores de alta costura y esos emergentes que nos dan vuelta con sus ideas, rockeros y groupies, fotógrafos consagrados y esos de Lomo, artis tas de galería y también de subsuelo, teens rebeldes de la noche y las nenas bien de Barrio Parque... Creativos publicitarios, directores de cine y todos esos que tenían algo interesante para decir nos tomaron de estandarte para portar su voz. Crecimos y nos convertimos en algo más que una revista... REGIA es una manifestación de la novedad: Somos un grupo de creativos del medio editorial y el fashion comprometidos en mostrar lo nuevo, lo que te gusta; eso que te abre la cabeza. Somos una revista, somos un espacio para el arte y a la fiesta; somos una filosofía.
